name: Hecahands Gaigas
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>見えざる手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヘカトンケイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ガイガス
desc: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Gaigas" once per turn. If a card(s) is added to your opponent's hand (except during the Draw Phase or Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can excavate the top 3 cards of your opponent's Deck, and if you do, you can Special Summon 1 excavated monster to your field, also shuffle the rest into the Deck.
mnst_eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Gaigas" once per turn. If a card(s) is added to your opponent's hand (except during the Draw Phase or Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can excavate the top 3 cards of your opponent's Deck, and if you do, you can Special Summon 1 excavated monster to your field, also shuffle the rest into the Deck.
eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Gaigas" once per turn. If a card(s) is added to your opponent's hand (except during the Draw Phase or Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can excavate the top 3 cards of your opponent's Deck, and if you do, you can Special Summon 1 excavated monster to your field, also shuffle the rest into the Deck.

action: Activates if your opponent draws a card
Activates if your opponent adds a card to the hand
Shuffles excavated cards into the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
